posts.author: Investingwitheb
posts.text: Hi All, Finally, the street seems to be valuing the 10.66% stake in Lloyd Metals, and the stock has zoomed in over the last few days. I wanted to ask experienced members": when the street starts cheering a hidden value story, how long does such re-rating typically sustain? Also, how do you think about exits once value discovery starts happening? For Sunflag, it still feels like early days to me. My thought process is that Lloyds continues to post superb results and management has guided for a strong FY27 as well. Of course, the key risk is that steel remains a cyclical sector. If Lloyds faces…
